STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_DRAIN:
Another player loses {Damage:diff()} HP, gains {Energy:energyIcons()}, and draws {Cards:diff()} cards.
You heal {Heal:diff()} HP.
Each time you play this card this combat, its HP loss increases by {DrainRampHp:diff()}, Energy granted increases by {DrainRampEnergy:energyIcons()}, and cards drawn increase by {DrainRampCards:diff()}.
Add a copy of this card to that player's [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_PASS_: Another player exhausts their entire [gold]Hand[/gold]. For each card exhausted, gain 1 [gold]Strength[/gold] and draw 1 card.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_YOUR_: Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Body Slam+|Body Slam}[/gold] to another player's [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_EVERY: ALL players [gold]Exhaust[/gold] their [gold]Hands[/gold], then each draws as many cards as they [gold]Exhausted[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_NO_CA: Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Acrobatics+|Acrobatics}[/gold] to another player's [gold]Hand[/gold]. Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_DEPLO: ALL players add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Infinite Blades+|Infinite Blades}[/gold] and a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Phantom Blades+|Phantom Blades}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_TOO_M: Another player gains {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and [gold]No Draw[/gold] this turn. Draw until your [gold]Hand[/gold] is full.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BROTH: ALL players [gold]Forge[/gold] {Forge:diff()}. Whenever a player plays a [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold], each other player adds their [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold] from wherever it is.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_ORBIT: ALL players add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Orbit+|Orbit}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_MINIO: Transform every card in another player's [gold]Hand[/gold] into a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Minion Strike+|Minion Strike}[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SHARE: Costs X {singleStarIcon}. ALL players gain X/2 {singleStarIcon} (rounded down) and add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Particle Wall+|Particle Wall}[/gold] and a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Alignment+|Alignment}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].

Gain {DoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold]. Add an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Reaper Form+|Reaper Form}[/gold] to each player's [gold]Hand[/gold]; it costs {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_GROUP: ALL players gain 99 [gold]Doom[/gold]. ALL players gain {Energy:energyIcons()} and deal [gold]double damage[/gold] this turn. ALL players discard their entire [gold]Hand[/gold], then draw 10 cards.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BLOOD: You and another player each add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Sleight of Flesh+|Sleight of Flesh}[/gold] to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_CORPS: Another player heals {Heal:diff()} HP. If they are revived, they gain {Energy:energyIcons()}, draw {Cards:diff()} cards, and add a [gold]Corpse Curse[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
At the end of your turn, if this card is in your [gold]Hand[/gold], take {Damage:diff()} damage.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BIASE: Add [gold]Biased Cognition[/gold] to each other player's [gold]Hand[/gold]. This turn, whenever another player spends {Energy:energyIcons()}, they channel {MpPerEnergySelfChannelPower:diff()} random [gold]Orb(s)[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SHOCK: Another player channels {Orbs:diff()} random [gold]Orb(s)[/gold]. Add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Boost Away+|Boost Away}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold]. Shuffle {Cards:diff()} [gold]Dazed[/gold] into their [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_STATU: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all [gold]Status[/gold] cards from ALL players. For each card [gold]Exhausted[/gold], add a random [gold]Status[/gold] card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_BRAIN: ALL players add a [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Creative AI+|Creative AI}[/gold] to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_ALL_O: ALL other players lose all {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}; you gain that much {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}. At the start of your next turn, lose all {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, gain [gold]No Draw[/gold] and [gold]Ringing[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_FOUR_: ALL players [gold]Exhaust[/gold] their [gold]Hands[/gold]. Each player adds that many random {IfUpgraded:show:Upgraded |}[gold]Colorless[/gold] cards to their [gold]Hand[/gold], then fills their [gold]Hand[/gold] with [gold]Infection[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SERPE: Add a [gold]Snakebite[/gold] to each player's [gold]Hand[/gold]. ALL players gain [gold]Serpent Brotherhood[/gold] (whenever a player plays a [gold]Snakebite[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_CHAOS: ALL players gain {Energy:energyIcons()}. Add one [gold]Ethereal[/gold] [gold]Demon Form+[/gold], [gold]Serpent Form+[/gold], [gold]Reaper Form+[/gold], [gold]Echo Form+[/gold], and [gold]Void Form+[/gold] to each player's [gold]Hand[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_TIGER:
ALL players gain {MpDoubleDamageTakenPower:diff()} stacks of [gold]Double Damage Taken[/gold].
Whenever you play two consecutive cards of different types among [gold]Attack[/gold], [gold]Skill[/gold], and [gold]Power[/gold], draw {MpTigerStudyFlowPower:diff()} cards.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_SHARE: At the end of combat, ALL players gain {MpSharedFortunePower:diff()} [gold]Gold[/gold].
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_CHECK:
Apply [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Check Your DPS+|Check Your DPS}[/gold] to another player.
If they play no [gold]Attack[/gold] by the end of their turn, at the start of the next turn they lose {IfUpgraded:show:{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}|{energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}} and draw 1 fewer card; other players gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)} and draw {IfUpgraded:show:2|1} extra card(s).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_WRIGG: ALL players gain [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw cards equal to the current combat turn count divided by 3 (rounded down).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_GAMBL: ALL enemies gain {StrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {RitualPower:diff()} [gold]Ritual[/gold]. Apply [gold]Bounty Mark[/gold] to ALL enemies (bounty cap {BountyGoldCap:diff()}).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_CARD_MP_COOL_:
Apply {DoomPower:diff()} [gold]Doom[/gold] to ALL players and ALL enemies.
Kill ALL players and ALL enemies whose [gold]Doom[/gold] is greater than or equal to their current HP.
